_comment: Front-page news strip. Newest first. 'pinned: true' floats a post to the top. A post is EITHER a normal text post (title/body, optional image and link) OR an embedded social post: set 'embed' to a LinkedIn or Instagram post URL and it renders the post itself. Only linkedin.com and instagram.com are allowed. 'category' controls the chip: news | competition | recruitment.

announcements.title: 3rd Place at ASCE Nationals, Our Best Finish Yet
announcements.body: Our team placed 3rd overall at the 2026 ASCE National Concrete Canoe Competition, competing against teams from the United States, Canada, China, and India. We also earned 2nd place in Best Technical Proposal and 5th in Best Technical Presentation.

announcements.title: NYU Tandon on our national result
Clean Sweep at Metropolitan Regionals
announcements.body: At the 2026 ASCE Metropolitan Student Symposium hosted at The College of New Jersey, NYU Concrete Canoe won 1st place in every single judged category, including 1st Place Overall.

announcements.title: New Members Welcome
announcements.body: No experience necessary. We train you. Whether you're interested in engineering, design, marketing, or project management, there's a place for you on the team.
